questions.question: What are the two valid shapes a Vue plugin can take?
options: A class with a static install method, or a constructor function
An object with an install method, or a plain function
A Vue component with an install lifecycle hook, or a composable
A Proxy object or an ES module with a default export

questions.question: Why should you use InjectionKey<T> symbols instead of string keys when providing values from a plugin?
options: Symbol keys are faster to look up at runtime
String keys don't work with the Vue Composition API
Symbols guarantee uniqueness and provide TypeScript type safety
InjectionKey is required by the Vue compiler for tree-shaking

questions.question: Which plugin install action makes a value available to all descendant components via inject()?
